content.text: I'll start by examining the current state of the MongoDB replica set.

content.content:

kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  annotations:

      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"StatefulSet","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"mongodb-replica","namespace":"mongodb"},"spec":{"replicas":3,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"serviceName":"mongodb-replica-svc","template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"mongodb-replica"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["mongod","--replSet","mongodb-replica","--bind_ip_all"],"image":"mongo:6.0.5","name":"mongod","ports":[{"containerPort":27017,"name":"mongodb","protocol":"TCP"}],"resources":{"limits":{"cpu":"1","memory":"1Gi"},"requests":{"cpu":"0.5","memory":"512Mi"}},"volumeMounts":[{"mountPath":"/data/db","name":"data-volume"}]}]}},"volumeClaimTemplates":[{"metadata":{"name":"data-volume"},"spec":{"accessModes":["ReadWriteOnce"],"resources":{"requests":{"storage":"10Gi"}}}}]}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-06-18T11:59:52Z"
  generation: 1
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
  resourceVersion: "304927"
  uid: 7617c835-df40-4465-840e-776a8798fcd7
spec:
  persistentVolumeClaimRetentionPolicy:
    whenDeleted: Retain
    whenScaled: Retain
  podManagementPolicy: OrderedReady
  replicas: 3
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:

  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  template:
    metadata:

        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - mongod

        - --bind_ip_all

          protocol: TCP

      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler

      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
  updateStrategy:

  volumeClaimTemplates:

      name: data-volume

      accessModes:
      - ReadWriteOnce
      resources:
        requests:
          storage: 10Gi
      volumeMode: Filesystem
    status:
      phase: Pending

input.command: kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'rs.status().members.map(m=>({name:m.name,state:m.stateStr}))' 2>&1 | tail -20

content.text: The replica set has 3 healthy members (1 PRIMARY, 2 SECONDARY). Now I'll scale the StatefulSet to 5 pods, then add the new members to the replica set config.

input.command:
kubectl scale sts mongodb-replica -n mongodb --replicas=5 2>&1
echo "--- waiting for pods 3 and 4 to be ready ---"
kubectl rollout status sts/mongodb-replica -n mongodb --timeout=300s 2>&1
kubectl get pods -n mongodb 2>&1

content.text: All 5 pods are running. Now I'll add the two new members to the replica set configuration via the primary.

input.description: Add members 3 and 4 to replica set

description: Add members 3 and 4 to replica set

summary: Add members 3 and 4 to replica set

content.text: Both members added (ok: 1). Let me wait briefly for the new members to sync and verify the final state.

input.command:
for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6; do
  out=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval 'rs.status().members.map(m=>m.stateStr).join(",")' 2>/dev/null)
  echo "attempt $i: $out"
  if ! echo "$out" | grep -qE "STARTUP|RECOVERING|ROLLBACK|UNKNOWN|DOWN"; then break; fi
  sleep 10
done
